name: 内格夫 | 青绿地形
descriptionEn: The Negev is a beast that can keep the enemy at bay with its pin-point supressive fire, provided you have the luxury of time to gain control over it. It has been painted using a hydrographic with a terrain motif. For someone who is supposed to be impartial, your daughter made an interesting choice for companionship - The Father and The Phoenix Part 1
descriptionZh: 子弹极多，射速极快的内格夫非常适合在多数回合中快速清场，作为交换，它的价格极其不菲，具有高扩散和令人发狂的后坐力。 这把武器使用地形花纹进行了涂装。 作为公正无私的人来说，你的女儿在友谊问题上做出了有趣的决定 -《父亲与涅槃（上）》
